summary: Iteration 146: Tested Content List active/passive state filter, restore functionality, and reset wireframe workflow. Backend state filter endpoints (active/passive) are working correctly. Reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint returns 503 DB_ERROR consistently. Frontend UI correctly displays active/passive switch, restore buttons in passive list, and reset wireframe button. Public home pages (TR/DE/FR) correctly render wireframe-based layout with expected sections.

critical.issue: Returns 503 DB_ERROR on every call. The endpoint appears to have database connection issues during the complex transaction (passivating all revisions + creating new home wireframes).

minor.issue: Returns 422 instead of expected 400 for invalid state filter. This is acceptable as Pydantic validation returns 422.

integration_issues.issue: Button exists and is clickable but the backend endpoint fails with DB_ERROR, so no visual feedback or state change occurs in UI after clicking

issues: Multiple React hydration errors in console (span inside option, span inside select, tr inside span, span inside tbody) - not blocking but should be fixed for proper HTML semantics

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint DB_ERROR - the endpoint times out or loses DB connection during complex transaction
Consider adding transaction batching or chunking for the passivate all + create wireframe workflow
Fix React hydration errors in AdminContentList.js (span children inside select/option/tbody/tr elements)
critical_code_review_comments: The reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint performs too many operations in a single transaction (fetching all revisions, passivating them, then creating 3 new home pages with drafts and publishing). This could cause DB connection timeouts.
Consider breaking the workflow into smaller transactions or using background tasks for heavy operations.

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed, 1 failed due to DB_ERROR on reset workflow)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (UI elements work, but reset workflow integration fails)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint consistently returns DB_ERROR. All other tested endpoints (state=active filter, state=passive filter, restore endpoint) work correctly. The frontend UI correctly implements active/passive view toggle with proper buttons and restore functionality visible in passive list. Public home pages (TR/DE/FR) render wireframe layout with 102 runtime components including category navigator, listing grid, CTA blocks, ad slots, heading and text blocks.
rca_of_the_issue: The reset-and-seed-home-wireframe endpoint failure is likely caused by: 1) Large transaction involving SELECT of all revisions, multiple UPDATE operations for passivation, then INSERT operations for new pages + revisions + publish 2) Possible DB connection pool exhaustion or timeout during the long-running transaction 3) MeiliSearch settings sync background task also experiencing timeouts, suggesting overall system resource contention
